title: HR & Admin Coordinator
description:
Company Overview / Employee Value Proposition

BAUMANN SPRING CO. (S) PTE. LTD. BAUMANN SPRINGS is a strong corporation delivering more technical variety, market presence, customer care and seamless expertise than anyone else. With its network of companies located in all important markets, its strong group synergies in technology transfer, supply chain and process know-how. BAUMANN SPRINGS can satisfy almost all customer needs in a variety of industrial sectors from Automotive, Electrical, Electronics, Telecommunications, Home & Office Appliances related products to Engineering solutions and Medical applications. We seek urgently the following position: BAUMANN Group has been a symbol of Swiss precision and quality for more than 125 years. We invite you to benefit from our experience as one of the world's leading manufacturers of springs and stampings. We are a family-run business, now in the hands of the fifth generation. The group has eleven production sites around the globe, where more than 1,500 people design and produce technically sophisticated products for selected industries, including the automotive, electrical engineering and medical technology sectors.

Job Summary

You will support HR team by managing employee medical claims, coordinating training programs, handling employee benefits, and assisting recruitment and onboarding processes to ensure smooth HR operations.

Responsibilities

  • Process and update employee medical claims in the system to ensure claims do not exceed set limits and submit insurance claims within company deadlines
  • Maintain accurate and current medical records and documentation for employees
  • Coordinate medical check-ups for work pass holders, including renewals and new applications, to ensure compliance with health requirements
  • Maintain and update training records and documentation to track training needs and evaluate training effectiveness
  • Prepare internal HR training materials and arrange MSOC training sessions for production work pass holders
  • Track and manage employee recognition programs such as long service awards, employee of the month, and perfect attendance awards
  • Organize monthly employee engagement activities, including fruit day and other events
  • Coordinate recruitment activities for production roles by arranging interviews and communicating with candidates throughout the hiring process
  • Manage job postings for open vacancies to attract suitable candidates
  • Support onboarding orientation and offboarding processes to ensure smooth employee transitions
  • Administer work pass applications, renewals, and updates for foreign residential and visa documentation
  • Collaborate with heads of departments and supervisors to resolve timesheet disputes and manage attendance tracking and leave for work pass holders on extended leave
  • Assist in planning and coordinating company events and corporate social responsibility activities
  • Conduct safety checks and manage meeting room facilities to maintain a safe and functional work environment
  • Perform other ad-hoc HR administrative tasks as assigned by supervisors

Required competencies and certifications

  • Nitec/Higher Nitec, Diploma, or HR professional certifications
  • Minimum 2 years of experience in HR administration
  • Proficient in Microsoft Office and MOM portal usage
  • Basic understanding of labor laws and HR practices
